headline: Monster Beverage, Stock Of The Day, Tests Buy Point As Summer Boost Looms
summary: Monster Beverage is the IBD Stock Of The Day amid accelerating growth. As peak summer looms for energy drinks, Monster Beverage stock has been testing a buy point. The energy drink company's sales growth has accelerated for the past four quarters, to 27% in Q1.
